elements.label: Description
elements.value: Game over triggers when settled items rest above the danger line for longer than the grace period. Only low-velocity items count to avoid false triggers during active play.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/danger.schema.json, set dgr_delay to {{dgr_delay}}]
Set GAME_OVER_DELAY to {{dgr_delay}} seconds.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/danger.schema.json, set dgr_line_y to {{dgr_line_y}}]
Set DANGER_LINE_Y to {{dgr_line_y}} pixels. Lower value = less container space = harder.
